nodes.name: adapter.rs
nodes.summary: Adapter bridging RuvLLM engine to Prime-Radiant coherence with stats tracking via atomics.

nodes.name: RuvLlmAdapter
nodes.summary: Coherence-aware inference adapter wrapping RuvLLM engine config and stats.

nodes.name: AdapterConfig
nodes.summary: Adapter configuration: storage path, embedding dim, timeouts, retries, caching.

nodes.name: AdapterStats
nodes.summary: Atomic counters tracking requests, pass/fail/escalation, cache hits, timing.

nodes.name: AdapterStatsSnapshot
nodes.summary: Plain-data snapshot of AdapterStats for serialization.

nodes.name: bridge.rs
nodes.summary: Policy and SONA learning bridges synchronizing state between Prime-Radiant and RuvLLM.

nodes.name: PolicyBridge
nodes.summary: Bidirectional policy synchronization bridge with conflict resolution.

nodes.name: PolicyBridgeConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for policy bridge: auto-sync, intervals, batching, conflict strategy.

nodes.name: ConflictResolution
nodes.summary: Conflict resolution strategy for policy syncs (newest/prefer/merge).

nodes.name: PolicySyncResult
nodes.summary: Result record of a policy sync operation with counts and timing.

nodes.name: SonaBridge
nodes.summary: Bridge connecting SONA learning loops between systems with feedback counter.

nodes.name: SonaBridgeConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for SONA bridge: feedback, EWC sync, micro-LoRA sharing.

nodes.name: LearningFeedback
nodes.summary: Learning feedback record with source, type, energy/quality scores, context.

nodes.name: FeedbackSource
nodes.summary: Source of learning feedback: PrimeRadiant, RuvLlm, or Human.

nodes.name: FeedbackType
nodes.summary: Type of feedback: coherence, quality, gate decision, human correction, threshold.

nodes.name: coherence_validator.rs
nodes.summary: Sheaf coherence validator producing witnessed allow/deny decisions for LLM responses.

nodes.name: ValidationContext
nodes.summary: Validation context bundling embeddings, scope, edge weights, request ID.

nodes.name: EdgeWeights
nodes.summary: Edge weighting profile for context/response/supporting evidence.

nodes.name: ValidationResult
nodes.summary: Allow/deny verdict with energy score, witness, and per-edge breakdown.

nodes.name: ValidationWitness
nodes.summary: Cryptographically integrity-checked witness for a validation decision.

nodes.name: WitnessDecision
nodes.summary: Compact allow/deny decision attached to validation witnesses.

nodes.name: ValidationError
nodes.summary: Errors raised during sheaf coherence validation.

nodes.name: ValidatorConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the SheafCoherenceValidator.

nodes.name: SheafCoherenceValidator
nodes.summary: Main validator combining coherence gate, policy bundle, and validation logic.

nodes.name: confidence.rs
nodes.summary: Confidence scoring derived from coherence energy with batched and explainable APIs.

nodes.name: CoherenceConfidence
nodes.summary: Confidence calculator translating coherence energy into 0-1 scores.

nodes.name: ConfidenceScore
nodes.summary: Confidence score wrapper with thresholds and human-readable levels.

nodes.name: ConfidenceLevel
nodes.summary: Discrete confidence buckets (e.g. high/medium/low) for escalation logic.

nodes.name: EnergyContributor
nodes.summary: Per-edge contribution to coherence energy for explainability.

nodes.name: config.rs
nodes.summary: Top-level LLM coherence configuration: gating modes, thresholds, hallucination policy.

nodes.name: LlmCoherenceConfig
nodes.summary: Master configuration for the LLM coherence pipeline.

nodes.name: GatingMode
nodes.summary: Gating mode controlling pre/post check semantics.

nodes.name: ResponsePolicy
nodes.summary: Action policy applied to a coherence-failed response.

nodes.name: CoherenceThresholds
nodes.summary: Numeric thresholds for allow/escalate/deny decisions.

nodes.name: HallucinationPolicy
nodes.summary: Policy describing how hallucinations are handled.

nodes.name: HallucinationAction
nodes.summary: Specific action (block/warn/rewrite) for detected hallucinations.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: Unified error type for the RuvLLM integration with categorization helpers and ADR refs.

nodes.name: RuvllmIntegrationError
nodes.summary: Top-level error enum covering validation, witness, pattern, memory, confidence, and config errors.

nodes.name: gate.rs
nodes.summary: LLM coherence gate evaluating response coherence and producing allow/deny/escalate decisions.

nodes.name: LlmCoherenceGate
nodes.summary: Main gate combining coherence engine, policy bundle, and config.

nodes.name: LlmGateDecision
nodes.summary: Output decision with allow/deny verdict and reason.

nodes.name: LlmGateReason
nodes.summary: Reason taxonomy for gate decisions.

nodes.name: CoherenceAnalysis
nodes.summary: Coherence analysis output (energy/lane) consumed by the gate.

nodes.name: ResponseCoherence
nodes.summary: Response coherence input bundling embeddings and context for the gate.

nodes.name: memory_layer.rs
nodes.summary: Coherent agentic-memory layer mapping memory entries onto a sheaf graph with episodic/working APIs.

nodes.name: MemoryCoherenceError
nodes.summary: Errors specific to the memory coherence layer.

nodes.name: MemoryType
nodes.summary: Memory category (semantic/episodic/working/etc.) with namespace and label.

nodes.name: MemoryEdgeType
nodes.summary: Edge-type classification for memory graph relationships with default weights.

nodes.name: MemoryEntry
nodes.summary: Embedded memory entry convertible into a sheaf node.

nodes.name: CoherenceResult
nodes.summary: Coherent/incoherent verdict on a memory addition with linked edges.

nodes.name: AgenticMemory
nodes.summary: Core agentic-memory interface for add/query/remove operations.

nodes.name: WorkingMemory
nodes.summary: Short-term working memory interface.

nodes.name: EpisodicMemory
nodes.summary: Episodic-sequence memory interface with ordering semantics.

nodes.name: MemoryCoherenceConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the memory coherence layer.

nodes.name: MemoryCoherenceLayer
nodes.summary: Concrete layer implementing AgenticMemory/WorkingMemory/EpisodicMemory over a SheafGraph.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Module root for ruvllm_integration: registers submodules and exposes factory helpers.

nodes.name: create_llm_gate
nodes.summary: Factory constructing an LlmCoherenceGate from engine/policy/config.

nodes.name: create_witness_adapter
nodes.summary: Factory for the default WitnessAdapter.

nodes.name: create_policy_bridge
nodes.summary: Factory for the default PolicyBridge.

nodes.name: pattern_bridge.rs
nodes.summary: Bridge converting RuvLLM patterns/verdicts into learned restriction maps for Prime-Radiant.

nodes.name: BridgeError
nodes.summary: Errors produced by the pattern bridge.

nodes.name: PatternData
nodes.summary: Source pattern record with embedding, quality, category, and source/target states.

nodes.name: VerdictData
nodes.summary: Verdict from external evaluator with success/partial/failure classification.

nodes.name: PatternProvider
nodes.summary: Provider interface yielding pattern data for bridging.

nodes.name: BridgeConfig
nodes.summary: Bridge configuration with sizing presets and validation.

nodes.name: BridgeStats
nodes.summary: Statistics on bridge throughput, conversions, and conflicts.

nodes.name: PatternToRestrictionBridge
nodes.summary: Main bridge learning restriction maps from verdicts and exporting them to Prime-Radiant.

nodes.name: ExportResult
nodes.summary: Result record for an export-to-Prime-Radiant call.

nodes.name: traits.rs
nodes.summary: Public trait surface (CoherenceValidatable, ContextSource, UnifiedWitnessProvider, etc.) for cross-system integration.

nodes.name: CoherenceValidatable
nodes.summary: Trait for types that can be validated for coherence.

nodes.name: Claim
nodes.summary: Claim record (statement, type, embeddings) checkable against context.

nodes.name: ClaimType
nodes.summary: Discrete claim categories used during validation.

nodes.name: ContextSource
nodes.summary: Provider trait yielding facts and semantic relations.

nodes.name: Fact
nodes.summary: Verified factual statement with embedding.

nodes.name: SemanticRelation
nodes.summary: Typed semantic relationship between claims/facts.

nodes.name: RelationType
nodes.summary: Relationship kinds (supports, contradicts, etc.).

nodes.name: UnifiedWitnessProvider
nodes.summary: Trait combining inference and coherence witnesses into a unified chain.

nodes.name: GenerationWitnessRef
nodes.summary: Lightweight reference to a GenerationWitness.

nodes.name: PatternBridge
nodes.summary: Cross-system pattern bridging interface.

nodes.name: RestrictionMapRef
nodes.summary: Reference to a learned restriction map for the bridge.

nodes.name: MemoryType
nodes.summary: Memory category used by the public traits interface.

nodes.name: MemoryEntry
nodes.summary: Memory entry shape exposed via public traits.

nodes.name: MemoryCoherenceProvider
nodes.summary: Trait for systems providing memory-coherence checks.

nodes.name: MemoryAddResult
nodes.summary: Outcome of adding a memory through a provider.

nodes.name: ConfidenceSource
nodes.summary: Trait emitting confidence results and uncertainty sources.

nodes.name: ConfidenceResult
nodes.summary: Confidence result produced by a ConfidenceSource.

nodes.name: UncertaintySource
nodes.summary: Named contributor to overall uncertainty.

nodes.name: witness_log.rs
nodes.summary: Unified witness log chaining inference and coherence witnesses with content hashing and query DSL.

nodes.name: UnifiedWitnessError
nodes.summary: Errors produced by the unified witness log.

nodes.name: GenerationWitnessId
nodes.summary: UUID-backed identifier for a generation witness.

nodes.name: InferenceWitnessSummary
nodes.summary: Summary of an inference witness embedded into a GenerationWitness.

nodes.name: CoherenceWitnessSummary
nodes.summary: Summary of a coherence witness embedded into a GenerationWitness.

nodes.name: GenerationWitness
nodes.summary: Unified, hash-chained witness combining inference and coherence summaries.

nodes.name: UnifiedWitnessStats
nodes.summary: Aggregate stats over the unified witness log.

nodes.name: WitnessQuery
nodes.summary: Fluent query builder for filtering witnesses.

nodes.name: UnifiedWitnessLog
nodes.summary: Hash-chained store of generation witnesses with query/verification/export.

nodes.name: witness.rs
nodes.summary: Witness adapter recording correlated unified witness entries across systems.

nodes.name: WitnessAdapter
nodes.summary: Adapter coordinating witness entries between Prime-Radiant and RuvLLM.

nodes.name: WitnessAdapterConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration for the WitnessAdapter.

nodes.name: UnifiedWitnessEntry
nodes.summary: Witness entry unifying source-tagged events with metrics and embeddings.

nodes.name: WitnessSource
nodes.summary: Origin tag for a unified witness entry (Prime-Radiant or RuvLLM).

nodes.name: WitnessEntryType
nodes.summary: Type taxonomy for witness entries.

nodes.name: LatencyBreakdown
nodes.summary: Per-stage latency breakdown attached to entries.

nodes.name: CoherenceMetrics
nodes.summary: Coherence metrics recorded on a witness entry.

nodes.name: LlmMetrics
nodes.summary: LLM-side metrics recorded on a witness entry.

nodes.name: CorrelationId
nodes.summary: UUID correlation identifier tying related entries together.

nodes.name: WitnessCorrelation
nodes.summary: Group of correlated witness entries with session metadata.

nodes.name: CorrelationSummary
nodes.summary: Aggregate summary across a correlation group.

nodes.name: limits.rs
nodes.summary: Security limit policies for graph size, resources, and state dimensions.

nodes.name: GraphLimits
nodes.summary: Bounds on graph nodes/edges and state dimensions.

nodes.name: ResourceLimits
nodes.summary: Per-request resource caps (matrix sizes, payloads).

nodes.name: SecurityConfig
nodes.summary: Composite security configuration with permissive/strict/testing presets.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Security module root re-exporting limits and validation surface.

nodes.name: validation.rs
nodes.summary: Input validation utilities: identifiers, states, paths, dimensions, and limit checks.

nodes.name: ValidationError
nodes.summary: Errors emitted by security validators.

nodes.name: InputValidator
nodes.summary: Validator enforcing identifier/state/matrix/payload limits.

nodes.name: PathValidator
nodes.summary: Path-traversal-safe path validator.

nodes.name: StateValidator
nodes.summary: State-vector validator with clamping support.

nodes.name: is_valid_identifier
nodes.summary: Free function predicate for safe identifiers.

nodes.name: is_valid_state
nodes.summary: Free function predicate for valid f32 state vectors.

nodes.name: sanitize_path_component
nodes.summary: Returns a sanitized path component or None if unsafe.

nodes.name: validate_dimension
nodes.summary: Validates that a dimension is within the configured maximum.

nodes.name: ingestion.rs
nodes.summary: Signal ingestion pipeline with batching, deduplication, and ordering.

nodes.name: Signal
nodes.summary: Single typed signal event addressable to a node.

nodes.name: SignalBatch
nodes.summary: Bounded batch of signals processed together.

nodes.name: SignalIngestion
nodes.summary: Ingestion queue producing SignalBatches with deduplication.

nodes.name: mod.rs
nodes.summary: Signal module root defining raw/validated signal records and payload taxonomy.

nodes.name: RawSignal
nodes.summary: Untrusted incoming signal prior to validation.

nodes.name: ValidatedSignal
nodes.summary: Signal that has cleared validation with metadata.

nodes.name: SignalType
nodes.summary: Discriminator over signal kinds.

nodes.name: NormalizedPayload
nodes.summary: Normalized payload variants after canonicalization.

nodes.name: ValidationMetadata
nodes.summary: Metadata attached during signal validation.

nodes.name: normalization.rs
nodes.summary: Signal normalization pipeline applying configurable transforms in place.

nodes.name: NormalizationConfig
nodes.summary: Configuration toggles for the normalizer.

nodes.name: Normalizer
nodes.summary: Stateless normalizer applying NormalizationConfig to signals.

nodes.name: validation.rs
nodes.summary: Signal-level validator producing pass/fail results with error lists.

nodes.name: ValidationResult
nodes.summary: Pass/fail validation result enum for signals.

nodes.name: SignalValidator
nodes.summary: Signal validator with configurable payload sizes and allowed types.

nodes.name: energy.rs
nodes.summary: SIMD-accelerated coherence energy and residual computations with scalar fallbacks.

nodes.name: batch_residuals_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD batch residual computation across sources and targets.

nodes.name: batch_residual_norms_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD batch computation of residual L2 norms.

nodes.name: compute_residual_norm_sq_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD squared residual norm between two slices.

nodes.name: weighted_energy_sum_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD weighted sum reducing residual norms to a scalar energy.

nodes.name: batch_lane_assignment_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD lane assignment for energies against four thresholds.

nodes.name: lanes_to_enum
nodes.summary: Maps raw lane bytes back to ComputeLane enum values.

nodes.name: compute_total_energy_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD reduction computing the total system energy.

nodes.name: compute_edge_energies_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD per-edge energy computation.

nodes.name: matrix.rs
nodes.summary: SIMD matrix kernels (matmul, matvec, transpose, outer product, add, scale) with scalar fallbacks.

nodes.name: matmul_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD blocked matrix multiplication.

nodes.name: matvec_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD matrix-vector multiplication.

nodes.name: transpose_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD matrix transpose.

nodes.name: outer_product_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD outer product of two vectors.

nodes.name: matadd_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD matrix addition.

nodes.name: matscale_simd
nodes.summary: SIMD in-place matrix scaling by a scalar.
